description: Send a contact request to another user. Creates a request record on the caller's repo.

subject.description: DID of the user to send a request to.

note.description: Optional message attached to the request.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing or invalid subject DID, or cannot request yourself.

errors.name: AlreadyExists
errors.description: A pending request or accepted contact already exists between these users.

errors.name: Blocked
errors.description: One party has blocked the other.
